Delicious Breakfast: A daily Italian breakfast is served, featuring fresh pastries, fruits, and juice. The breakfast area provides a pleasant start to the day, setting the tone for a memorable experience.
Convenient Amenities: Guests benefit from daily housekeeping service, luggage storage, and free on-site private parking.
